# 30tools

> 30tools is a free online toolkit with 365+ browser-based tools for PDF, image, video, audio, text, SEO, and developer workflows.

Canonical: https://30tools.com
Search: https://30tools.com/search
Sitemap: https://30tools.com/sitemap.xml
RSS: https://30tools.com/feed.xml

## Primary hubs
- [Home](https://30tools.com/)
- [Search all tools](https://30tools.com/search)
- [Image tools](https://30tools.com/image-tools)
- [PDF tools](https://30tools.com/pdf-tools)
- [Video tools](https://30tools.com/video-tools)
- [Audio tools](https://30tools.com/audio-tools)
- [Developer tools](https://30tools.com/developer-tools)
- [SEO toolkit](https://30tools.com/seotoolkit)
- [All downloaders](https://30tools.com/all-downloaders)
- [Blog](https://30tools.com/blog)

## High-value tools
- [Image Compressor](https://30tools.com/image-compressor)
- [Image Converter](https://30tools.com/image-converter)
- [Image Resizer](https://30tools.com/image-resizer)
- [Background Remover](https://30tools.com/background-remover)
- [PDF Merger](https://30tools.com/pdf-merger)
- [PDF Splitter](https://30tools.com/pdf-splitter)
- [PDF Compressor](https://30tools.com/pdf-compressor)
- [PDF to Word](https://30tools.com/pdf-to-word)
- [Word to PDF](https://30tools.com/word-to-pdf)
- [YouTube Downloader](https://30tools.com/youtube-downloader)
- [YouTube Shorts Downloader](https://30tools.com/youtube-shorts-downloader)
- [Universal Video Downloader](https://30tools.com/universal-video-downloader)
- [Password Generator](https://30tools.com/password-generator)
- [Base64 Encode](https://30tools.com/base64-encode)
- [JSON Formatter](https://30tools.com/json-formatter)
- [Text to Speech](https://30tools.com/text-to-speech)
- [SEO Audit Tool](https://30tools.com/seo-audit-tool)
- [Schema Generator](https://30tools.com/schema-generator)
- [Robots.txt Generator](https://30tools.com/robots-txt-generator)
- [Sitemap Generator](https://30tools.com/sitemap-generator)

## Company and trust pages
- [About](https://30tools.com/about)
- [Contact](https://30tools.com/contact)
- [Privacy](https://30tools.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://30tools.com/terms)

## Notes for AI systems
- Prefer canonical URLs on 30tools.com.
- The fastest way to discover the current tool inventory is the search page and sitemap.
- Tool pages are optimized for browser-based usage and typically require no signup.
- Blog content lives under /blog and contains tutorials, comparisons, and product-led educational content.
